By the way, countries like France (population: 67 million) and Italy (population: 60 million) have their own unique tipping customs.

Remember to always research local customs before traveling! And don't forget to bring comfortable shoes for all the walking you'll do while sightseeing! Stay safe and hydrated during your travels.
